description: Machine-readable LoveTypes catalog for free guardian keepsakes, owned supply requests, affiliate books, and Luna Gumroad packs.

zh.rule: Traditional Chinese pages keep Books.com.tw affiliate URLs.

en.rule: English pages use Amazon Associates URLs.

ja.rule: Japanese pages use Amazon Associates URLs.

ko.rule: Korean pages use Amazon Associates URLs.

es.rule: Spanish pages use Amazon Associates URLs.

safetyBoundaries: Relationship reflection and communication support only.
No therapeutic, medical, legal, diagnostic, or guaranteed outcome claims.
Affiliate links and Gumroad purchase links are disclosed as commercial paths.
Email waitlist requests do not require quiz scores or sensitive personal details.

revenuePlaybook.useWhen: A visitor has a guardian result but has not yet shown buying or email intent.
revenuePlaybook.nextStep: Offer the free guardian card first, then route back to the matching supply route or repair plan.
revenuePlaybook.doNotUseWhen: Do not frame the keepsake as proof, diagnosis, or a relationship test result.

revenuePlaybook.useWhen: A visitor clicks a guardian supply route, asks for a downloadable asset, or reaches Contact with funnel context.
revenuePlaybook.nextStep: Ask for minimum context: guardian, use case, and desired format. Keep requests email-based until demand is proven.
revenuePlaybook.doNotUseWhen: Do not request sensitive details, quiz scores, emergency support details, or private relationship evidence.

revenuePlaybook.useWhen: A visitor wants longer-form reading after seeing their guardian supply route or repair plan.
revenuePlaybook.nextStep: Show one relevant book as optional extended reading with affiliate disclosure.
revenuePlaybook.doNotUseWhen: Do not imply the book will fix the relationship, replace apology, or replace counseling.

revenuePlaybook.useWhen: A visitor wants night reflection, conflict cooldown, journaling, or post-quiz emotional sorting.
revenuePlaybook.nextStep: Route to the Luna starter pack first, then compare other Gumroad packs only if they keep exploring Luna.
revenuePlaybook.doNotUseWhen: Do not position audio as therapy, medical support, sleep treatment, or guaranteed conflict repair.
